title: The Great Sword
description: Pull the sword from the stone. Like King Arthur! (If he's real)
body:
The cave filled with vines, and moss. Lush plant life and oh... some things behind those vines?
A SWORD INSIDE A STONE!
This mod adds a feature based of the legend of King Arthur. Find the sword at -34 37 82 and right click on the stone! The does 10 damage and has 4 attack speed. So in other words, pretty over powered
I've got a discord server if you would like some help or just to ask me something. I'd be happy to help, just ping me in my general chat.

<details>
